title: Garlicky Crumbly Dutch Sushi Rice Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and crowd-pleasing dish featuring sushi rice mixed with garlic, soy sauce, and vegetables for a satisfying side or main course.
instructions: Rinse sushi rice with cold water and drain well. Place in a pot with 1/4 cup of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until all the liquid is absorbed (about 20 minutes). Let sit covered for an additional 10 minutes.
In a large skillet or wok, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Add finely chopped carrots to the skillet with garlic. Stir in sushi rice, soy sauce, and the rest of the water (if any is left from soaking). Cook for another 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Optional: Add finely chopped peppers if desired for extra flavor and texture.
Serve hot as a side dish or use it as a base for other dishes like sushi rolls.
